known_issues: Blank page / white screen error occurring before authentication on app startup

existing_features.title: Fix the blank white screen that occurs on app startup before the authentication flow begins. The app should render a visible loading state or the login page immediately on launch without crashing.

Audit and fix the initialization sequence in App.tsx and the AuthenticatedOnly guard to ensure the Internet Identity authentication state is fully initialized before any route rendering or data fetching is attempted, preventing crashes from accessing undefined identity state.
